debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S D : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
a b : α
hb : b ≤ a
hb' : b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})
I : Set α
hI : I ∈ R
hI' : a ∈ I
⊢ b ≤ ⊥

failed_attempts:
-- We assume S is independent (hypothesis missing from context)
  have hS : sSupIndep S := sorry
  have h_disj : Disjoint a (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) := by
    -- Split the union into (I \ {a}) and the rest (⋃ J ≠ I, J)
    let Rest := ⋃ (J ∈ R.carrier) (_ : J ≠ I), J
    have h_sub : (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} ⊆ (I \ {a}) ∪ Rest := by
      rintro x ⟨⟨_, ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩, rfl⟩, hxa⟩
      by_cases h : J = I
      · left; subst h; exact ⟨hxJ, hxa⟩
      · right; exact ⟨J, hJ, h, hxJ⟩
    apply Disjoint.mono_right (sSup_le_sSup h_sub)
    rw [sSup_union]
    apply Disjoint.disjoint_sup_right
    · exact (R.carrier_indep I hI).pairwise_disjoint hI'
    · -- The independence of S implies sSup I is disjoint from sSup Rest
      apply Disjoint.mono_left (le_sSup hI')
      sorry
  exact h_disj.le_bot_of_le hb hb'
